GeoMx Planning

Batch 2 (2024): 14 samples, 10 ROIs / ~15 AOIs per sample, 2 pairs of pre/post samples included

Batch 1 (2023): 16 samples, 10 ROIs / 20 AOIs per sample, 5 pairs of pre/post samples listed

Batch 3 (2025): 27 samples(-4?, +4, +3, =30), 10 ROIs / 20 AOIs? per sample, 6 pairs of pre/post samples enrolled

GeoMx Planning

By Aleksandra

GeoMx Planning

GeoMx Planning

GeoMx Planning

Morphology Marker Panel

One possible CD20 marker in channel AF594 (Texas Red) in geomx validated/tested morphology markers’ list: CD20, Clone: IGEL/773, AF594, Novus, NBP2-47840AF594
but in Tuulia’s paper they used CD20 - Spark NIR685 BioLegend 302366 (in Cy5)

Key discuss points:
Sample scale?
ROI selection criteria? 1 ROI = 1 AOI?
Utilizing proteomics data: same micro-area for picking/ROIs selection
Experimental design & Calculations
Reagents / Buffers ordering in advance
And also - tCycIF panels?

Next steps
